steps.title: Identify the actual value
steps.content: The charity with the greatest percent spent on programs is the highest point on the scatterplot. Its actual percent is about $92\%$.

steps.title: Compare to the prediction
steps.content:
At the same $x$-value, the line of best fit predicts slightly above $85\%$. The difference is about
$$92-85=7$$
The answer is B.
